retrieved_result: Caring For Your Keratin Hair Treatment Caring For Your Keratin Hair Treatment I had a Brazilian Blowout done 8 weeks ago. Sadly, I started to see my curl and texture coming back about 2 weeks ago. I can’t tell you how much I enjoyed having easy to blow-out hair that dried straight with a rough dry and didn’t tangle. Really, it was a life
